duel.name: Duel
duel.desc: If you hit the same enemy multiple times, you gain bonus damage which keeps increasing with each new hit. The effect ends if you hit a different enemy, or you abandon combat.

rapid_fire.name: Rapid fire
rapid_fire.desc: For a few seconds, your rate of fire with bows increases.

flurry.name: Flurry
flurry.desc: For a few seconds, your melee attack speed increases.

precission_strikes.name: Precission Strikes
precission_strikes.desc: Your critical chance with melee weapons is increased.

precission_shots.name: Precission Shots
precission_shots.desc: Your critical chance with ranged weapons is increased.

massive_criticals.name: Massive Criticals
massive_criticals.desc: Your critical hits go beyond the usual 150% max damage, with a chance to insta-kill enemies 2 levels below yours (some are immune)

heavyhand.name: Heavyhand
heavyhand.desc: Extensive training makes you put more might behind every blow. Your melee attacks cause additional damage.

assassinate.name: Assassinate
assassinate.desc: After a succesful Stab, the skill has a chance to immediately cool down and be available again.

explosive_traps.name: Explosive Traps
explosive_traps.desc: Your traps explode right after being triggered, causing fire damage in a 2m radius. It also affects you, but not your party members.

poison_master.name: Poison Master
poison_master.desc: You are well versed in the dubious art of poisoning your weapons, and your familiarity makes you resistant to many of them.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.desc: You can use your Stealth even when enemies have discovered you, poofing out of sight.

battle_rage.name: Battle Rage
battle_rage.desc: You enter a state of unleashed fury gaining a bonus to STR and armor. You become immune to stun or paralysis, also removing the effect. Afterwards you will be fatigued for 5 s.(-5 damage and armor).

bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
bloodlust.desc: A battle trance that sharpens your focus and makes you unstoppable. Adds bonuses for some seconds after you kill an enemy in melee (non-cumulative)

magical_training.name: Magical Training
magical_training.desc: Despite not having any magical powers, you have been trained to use magic items that have a mana cost. It can be rather exhausting for your health.

turn_undead.name: Turn Undead
turn_undead.desc: The Holiness within you can disrupt the undead by your mere presence, paralyzing them.

retribution.name: Retribution
retribution.desc: Whenever you destroy an undead or an outsider from another plane, you will absorb its essence, transforming it into magical energy. It might not work with certain monsters.

guardian_wolf.name: Guardian Wolf
guardian_wolf.desc: Summon a wild spirit which takes the form of a wolf and follows you.

spiritual_ward.name: Spiritual Ward
spiritual_ward.desc: Your willpower and inner strength are legendary, making you more resilient to stun, paralysis and other mind effects. Gain a permanent bonus to Spirit resistance, which stacks with other bonuses.

shock_ward.name: Shock Ward
shock_ward.desc: You can endure elemental damage thanks to your training. Gain a permanent bonus to Shock resistance, which stacks with other bonuses.

fire_ward.name: Fire Ward
fire_ward.desc: You can endure elemental damage thanks to your training. Gain a permanent bonus to Fire resistance, which stacks with other bonuses.

ice_ward.name: Ice Ward
ice_ward.desc: You can endure elemental damage thanks to your training. Gain a permanent bonus to Cold resistance, which stacks with other bonuses.

death_ward.name: Death Ward
death_ward.desc: You can endure death magic thanks to your training. Gain a permanent bonus to Death resistance, which stacks with other bonuses.

toxic_ward.name: Toxic Ward
toxic_ward.desc: You can endure acid and poison thanks to your training. Gain a permanent bonus to Toxic resistance, which stacks with other bonuses.

battle_prayer.name: Battle Prayer
battle_prayer.desc: You bless your party members, summoned creatures and yourself for the next 12 seconds.

flames_of_faith.name: Flames of Faith
flames_of_faith.desc: In a 3m area around you enemies are burned with spiritual flames and allies healed. It lasts 6 seconds and has no effect on you.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.desc: You can use Stealth even if you are surrounded by enemies. Useful to escape, or to prepare a lethal backstab.

body_development.name: Body Development
body_development.desc: Your intensive training results in higher maximum hit points

infantry_training.name: Infantry Training
infantry_training.desc: You have been trained to survive in the battlefield, giving you an edge to parry and block when you wield both a shield and a hand weapon(not light).

gate.name: Gate
gate.desc: While you are not a 'Traveller' wizard, you are still capable of some limited forms of teleportation. This power will not work in large towns and some areas that are magically sealed.

disintegrate.name: Disintegrate
disintegrate.desc: You call upon devastating magical energies to enhance your next weapon attack with a large amount of normal damage. The attack must be done quickly or the power vanishes.

mage_barrier.name: Mage Barrier
mage_barrier.desc: Your Mage Armor is improved, becoming dangerous and frustrating for your foes. Enemies hitting you in melee while your Mage Armor is active will be affected.

arcanist.name: Arcanist
arcanist.desc: You are capable of powering wands and staves labeled as Arcane without requiring so much mana.

fire_mastery.name: Fire Mastery
fire_mastery.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Fire for 3 minutes. They are capable of dealing good damage, but rather fragile. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

ice_mastery.name: Ice Mastery
ice_mastery.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Ice for 3 minutes. They're very resilient creatures. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

earth_mastery.name: Earth Mastery
earth_mastery.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Earth for 3 minutes. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

summoner.name: Summoner
summoner.desc: You are capable of strengthening the link between summoned creatures and their home plane. The creature's level is increased, and can even go above yours.

arcane_blade.name: Arcane Blade
arcane_blade.desc: As an Arcane Knight you can use any Hand weapon or Light weapon that deals additional fire, cold or shock damage.

vampiric_blade.name: Vampiric Blade
vampiric_blade.desc: As an Arcane Knight you can use any melee weapon that deals death damage, even two-handed weapons.

combustion.name: Combustion
combustion.desc: In a 3m area around you enemies are burned. They also suffer a reduction of their Armor and resistances to Fire, Cold and Shock for 15 seconds.

death_cloud.name: Death Cloud
death_cloud.desc: Launch a poisonous cloud towards the enemy you face (or the nearest enemy if you face none). Besides dealing damage it will reduce resistance to Death and slow enemies for 12 seconds.
